# Rocket Payments

> UK payment processing company offering card machines, merchant services, business funding, and booking systems for UK businesses.

## About

Rocket Payments is a UK-based payment processing provider serving over 110,000 businesses. We offer free card payment terminals, competitive transaction rates starting from 0.29%, and business funding from £5,000 to £500,000. Based in Kent, serving businesses across the UK.

## Products

### Card Payment Terminals
- **Rocket Go** — Portable 4G card machine for in-person payments. Free with merchant account. Accepts contactless, chip & PIN, Apple Pay, Google Pay.
- **Rocket Pocket** — All-in-one ordering and payment device with built-in printer. Ideal for restaurants and hospitality.
- **Rocket Wired** — Countertop card machine with ethernet connection. Best for fixed retail locations.
- **Tap to Pay on iPhone** — Accept contactless payments using an iPhone. No additional hardware needed.

### Online Payments
- **Payment Links** — Send payment links via SMS, email, or WhatsApp. No website needed.
- **Online Payments** — Full payment gateway for ecommerce with 3D Secure and fraud protection.

### Business Growth
- **Flex Funds** — Merchant cash advance from £5,000 to £500,000. Repay through card sales.
- **Sidekick** — Digital business management tool with analytics and insights.
- **Rocket Bookings** — Restaurant and hospitality reservation system. Commission-free alternative to OpenTable.

## Pricing
- UK Debit Cards: from 0.29% per transaction
- UK Credit Cards: from 0.67% per transaction
- International Cards: from 0.9% per transaction
- No monthly fees, no setup fees, no cancellation fees
- Free card terminal included

## Business Funding
- Merchant Cash Advance: £5,000 to £500,000
- Business Loans available
- Approval within 24-48 hours
- Repayments flex with your card turnover
- Available to businesses with regular card payments

## Integrations
Compatible with 600+ EPOS systems including ICRTouch, Goodtill, Lightspeed, Square POS, and more.

## Service Areas
- Primary: Kent, East Sussex, South East England
- Coverage: All of United Kingdom
- Key locations: Maidstone, Canterbury, Tunbridge Wells, Brighton, Eastbourne, Hastings, Ashford, Dover, Folkestone

## Contact
- Website: https://rocketpayments.co.uk
- Free quote: https://rocketpayments.co.uk/calculate-savings
- Business funding: https://rocketpayments.co.uk/business-funding

## Key Facts
- 110,000+ businesses served
- 1.8 billion transactions processed annually
- 99.99% uptime
- PCI DSS Level 1 certified (P2PE)
- Next-day payment settlement
- 24/7 UK-based support
- 4.9/5 average rating
